_notes: Skill reference data for all characters. Static — effects and AP costs do not change. Character state (learned/equipped) lives in data/characters.json. Monoco skills include Bestial Wheel data.

Maelle.name: Breaking Rules
Maelle.description: Destroys all target shields. Gains 1 AP per shield destroyed. If target is Defenceless: grants a second turn.

Maelle.name: Burning Canvas
Maelle.description: High Void damage + 1 burn per hit. Damage increased for each burn stack on target.

Maelle.name: Combustion
Maelle.description: Medium single target Physical damage. 2 hits. Consumes up to 10 Burn for increased damage.

Maelle.name: Degagement
Maelle.description: Low Fire damage. Target becomes weak to Fire.

Maelle.name: Égide
Maelle.description: Protects allies by taking damage in their place for 2 turns.

Maelle.name: Fencer's Flurry
Maelle.description: Medium AoE. Applies Defenceless 1 turn.

Maelle.name: Fleuret Fury
Maelle.description: 3-hit high single-target Physical. Stays in Virtuose if already there. Can Break.

Maelle.name: Guard Up
Maelle.description: Shell buff for allies.

Maelle.name: Gustave's Homage
Maelle.description: 8-hit extreme Physical damage. Switches to Virtuose Stance.

Maelle.name: Last Chance
Maelle.description: Reduces self-health to 1. Refills all AP.

Maelle.name: Mezzo Forte
Maelle.description: Reapply current stance. Give 2–4 AP.

Maelle.name: Momentum Strike
Maelle.description: High damage. Costs 4 AP in Virtuose.

Maelle.name: Offensive Switch
Maelle.description: Low damage. Applies Defenceless to enemy.

Maelle.name: Payback
Maelle.description: Very high Physical damage. Reduced AP cost for each attack parried since last turn. Can Break.

Maelle.name: Percée
Maelle.description: Increased damage to Marked target. 2 AP in Virtuose but leaves Virtuose after — one use per Virtuose window.

Maelle.name: Phantom Strike
Maelle.description: 4-hit very high Void AoE. Switches to Defensive stance. Gives +35% of a Gradient Charge.

Maelle.name: Rain of Fire
Maelle.description: Medium Fire damage + 3 burn per hit, 2 hits. Applies 2 more burn per hit if in Defensive.

Maelle.name: Spark
Maelle.description: Low Fire damage + 3 burn. Applies 2 more burn if in Offensive.

Maelle.name: Stendhal
Maelle.description: Extreme single-target Void damage, 1 hit. Switches to Stanceless. Removes self-shields. Applies Defenceless to self. Nerfed 40% in Patch 1.2.3.

Maelle.name: Swift Stride
Maelle.description: Low Physical. Switches to Virtuose if target burning. Regains 0–2 AP.

Maelle.name: Sword Ballet
Maelle.description: 5-hit extreme single-target weapon element. Crits deal double damage. Primary Virtuose damage skill.

Verso.name: Berserk Slash
Verso.description: Medium Physical, 3 hits. Damage scales with missing HP.

Verso.name: Blitz
Verso.description: Insta-kills low-health enemies; otherwise deals damage.

Verso.name: Burden
Verso.description: Removes status effects from all allies.

Verso.name: End Bringer
Verso.description: Extreme Physical damage, 6 hits. Increased damage if target Stunned.

rank_bonus.effect: Can reapply stun on broken target

Verso.name: From Fire
Verso.description: Healing from Burn. Situational — only useful if enemies have burn.

Verso.name: Light Holder
Verso.description: Medium Light damage, 5 hits. Gains +1 Rank at completion.

Verso.name: Marking Shot
Verso.description: Low damage + 100% Mark. No HP cost.

Verso.name: Paradigm Shift
Verso.description: Generates 1–3 AP. C Rank: bonus only. NOT a rank jump to S.

Verso.name: Perfect Break
Verso.description: Very high Light damage. Can Break. Rank S on Break.

Verso.name: Perfect Recovery
Verso.description: Heals Verso only. Non-functional with Chevalam.

Verso.name: Phantom Stars
Verso.description: AoE multi-hit all enemies. Trash fights only — useless in 1v1.

Verso.name: Purification
Verso.description: Medium Light damage, 2 hits. Dispels self status effects.

Verso.name: Steeled Strike
Verso.description: After 1 turn charge, extreme Physical damage. Interrupted if damage taken during charge.

Sciel.name: Dark Cleansing
Sciel.description: Cleanses an ally of their status effects and propagates that ally's buffs to all allies.

Sciel.name: Dark Wave
Sciel.description: High Dark AoE, 3 hits. Consumes all Foretell for increased damage.

Sciel.name: Delaying Slash
Sciel.description: High single-target Dark damage. Consumes Foretell for increased damage. Delays target's next turn.

Sciel.name: Final Path
Sciel.description: High damage, applies 10 Foretell in one turn. Fast route to big Plentiful Harvest.

Sciel.name: Firing Shadow
Sciel.description: Low Dark AoE, 3 hits. Consumes 1 Foretell per hit for increased damage.

Sciel.name: Focused Foretell
Sciel.description: Applies 2 Foretell (or 5 if target has none). Core Foretell reset mechanic for Plentiful Harvest loop.

Sciel.name: Fortune's Fury
Sciel.description: Doubles one ally's damage for their next turn. Must be used before target acts.

Sciel.name: Grim Harvest
Sciel.description: Medium single-target Dark damage, 1 hit. Heals all allies 30% HP + 5% per Foretell consumed.

Sciel.name: Harvest
Sciel.description: Heals Sciel based on Foretell stacks consumed.

Sciel.name: Intervention
Sciel.description: Grants targeted ally an immediate extra turn + 4 AP (Greater Rush).

Sciel.name: Phantom Blade
Sciel.description: High single-target Dark damage, 1 hit. Consumes all Foretell for increased damage. Can Break.

Sciel.name: Plentiful Harvest
Sciel.description: Consumes all Foretell on target → 1 AP per stack, split between party. 5 stacks = +2/+2/+1; 10 stacks = +3/+3/+4.

Sciel.name: Sealed Fate
Sciel.description: High single-target weapon element, 5–7 hits. Each hit consumes 1 Foretell for 200% more damage. Crits don't remove Foretell.

Sciel.name: Searing Bond
Sciel.description: Medium single-target Dark, 1 hit. Applies 5 Foretell. Also deals damage and applies Foretell to every other Burning enemy.

Sciel.name: Twilight Dance
Sciel.description: High single-target Dark damage in Twilight state. Consumes Foretell. Extends Twilight duration by 1 turn.

Sciel.name: Twilight Slash
Sciel.description: Low single-target Physical damage. Applies 2 Foretell.

Lune.name: Crustal Crush
Lune.description: High single-target Earth damage + Break damage, 5 hits. Consumes Lightning Stain ×2 for increased damage (×3).

Lune.name: Earth Rising
Lune.description: Low Earth AoE, 1 hit. Consumes Lightning Stain for increased damage (×1.5).

Lune.name: Electrify
Lune.description: Low single-target Lightning damage, 3 hits. Crits trigger an additional hit. Consumes Fire Stain to generate Light Stain.

Lune.name: Elemental Genesis
Lune.description: Extreme damage to all enemies, 8 hits. Each hit deals random element damage. Requires Lightning, Earth, Fire and Ice Stains.

Lune.name: Elemental Trick
Lune.description: Low single-target Ice, Fire, Lightning, and Earth damage, 4 hits. Critical hits generate the corresponding Stain.

Lune.name: Fire Rage
Lune.description: Increasingly high Fire AoE every turn until Lune receives damage. Stuns itself if interrupted. Consumes Ice Stain ×2 for increased damage (×2).

Lune.name: Healing Light
Lune.description: Heals targeted ally 30–50% HP and dispels all status effects. Consumes Earth Stain ×2 for 0 AP cost. Generates Light Stain.

Lune.name: Hell
Lune.description: Very high Fire AoE, 2 hits. Applies 5 Burn per hit. Deals self-damage if failed. Consumes Ice, Earth and Lightning Stains for greatly increased damage (×3).

Lune.name: Ice Lance
Lune.description: Medium single-target Ice damage, 1 hit. Slows target 3 turns. Consumes Earth Stain for increased damage (×1.5).

Lune.name: Immolation
Lune.description: Low single-target Fire damage, 1 hit. Applies 3 Burn. Applies 2 more Burn if target is Marked. Consumes Ice Stain for increased damage (×1.5).

Lune.name: Lightning Dance
Lune.description: Very high single-target Lightning damage, 6 hits. Crits trigger an additional hit. Consumes Earth, Ice and Fire Stains for greatly increased damage (×5).

Lune.name: Mayhem
Lune.description: Consumes all Stains to deal high elemental damage, 1–4 hits. Can Break if 4 Stains consumed.

Lune.name: Rebirth
Lune.description: Revives an ally with 30–70% Health and 2 AP. Consumes Lightning Stain ×3 for 0 AP cost.

Lune.name: Revitalisation
Lune.description: Heals 1–3 allies 40–60% Health. Consumes Fire Stain ×3 to also apply Regen for 3 turns.

Lune.name: Rockslide
Lune.description: Medium single-target Earth damage, 2 hits. Can Break. Consumes Lightning, Ice and Fire Stains for greatly increased damage (×5).

Lune.name: Terraquake
Lune.description: Earth AoE + deals Earth and Break damage to all enemies every turn for 3 turns. Increases all Break damage received by 50%. Consumes Lightning Stain ×2 to extend to 5 turns.

Lune.name: Thermal Transfer
Lune.description: Low single-target Ice damage, 2 hits. Gains 4 AP if target is Burning. Consumes Earth Stain ×2: Play a second turn.

Lune.name: Thunderfall
Lune.description: Medium Lightning damage to random enemies, 2–6 hits. Crits trigger an additional hit. Consumes Fire Stain for increased damage (×1.5).

Lune.name: Typhoon
Lune.description: Ice AoE + on turn start deals high Ice damage to all enemies and heals allies 20% HP for 3 turns. Consumes Earth Stain ×2 to extend to 5 turns.

Lune.name: Wildfire
Lune.description: Medium Fire AoE, 1 hit. Applies 3 Burn. Consumes Ice Stain ×2 for increased damage (×2).

Monoco.name: Abbest Wind
Monoco.description: Low Physical single target, 1 hit. Plays a second turn.

Monoco.name: Aberration Light
Monoco.description: High Light AoE, 2 hits. Applies 4 Burn per hit.

Monoco.name: Ballet Charm
Monoco.description: Low Light single target, 1 hit. Applies Powerless 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Bénisseur Mortar
Monoco.description: Medium Ice single target, 3 hits. Jumps to Almighty Mask if target is Marked.

Monoco.name: Boucheclier Fortify
Monoco.description: Applies Shell to 1–3 allies for 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Braseleur Smash
Monoco.description: Medium Fire single target, 2 hits. Applies 3 Burn.

Monoco.name: Bruler Bash
Monoco.description: Medium Physical single target, 3 hits. Can Break.

Monoco.name: Chalier Combo
Monoco.description: High Physical single target, 6 hits. Interrupted if failed.

Monoco.name: Chapelier Slash
Monoco.description: High Physical AoE, 3 hits. Applies Mark.

Monoco.name: Chevalière Ice
Monoco.description: High Ice AoE, 3 hits. Applies Slow 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Chevalière Piercing
Monoco.description: Physical single target through Shields, 6 hits. More damage per Shield on target.

Monoco.name: Chevalière Thrusts
Monoco.description: High Physical AoE, 3 hits. Crits deal double damage.

Monoco.name: Clair Enfeeble
Monoco.description: Medium Light AoE, 1 hit. Applies Powerless 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Contorsionniste Blast
Monoco.description: Medium Physical AoE, 1 hit. Heals all allies 10% HP per enemy hit.

Monoco.name: Creation Void
Monoco.description: Extreme Void damage to random targets, 3 hits. More damage if same target hit multiple times.
Monoco._note: AP cost unconfirmed — skill not yet learned

Monoco.name: Cruler Barrier
Monoco.description: Applies 1–2 Shields to target.

Monoco.name: Cultist Blood
Monoco.description: Medium Dark AoE, 3 hits. Sacrifices 90% HP for increased damage.

Monoco.name: Cultist Slashes
Monoco.description: Medium Dark single target, 3 hits. More damage the less HP Monoco has.

Monoco.name: Danseuse Waltz
Monoco.description: High Fire single target, 3 hits. More damage against Burning targets.

Monoco.name: Démineur Thunder
Monoco.description: Low Lightning single target, 1 hit. Extra Break damage.

Monoco.name: Duallist Storm
Monoco.description: Extreme Physical single target, 4 hits. Can Break.

Monoco.name: Échassier Stabs
Monoco.description: Medium Physical single target, 2 hits. Second hit applies Mark.

Monoco.name: Évêque Spear
Monoco.description: High Earth single target, 1 hit. Applies Powerless 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Gault Fury
Monoco.description: Low Physical single target, 4 hits. Applies Mark.

Monoco.name: Glaise Earthquakes
Monoco.description: Medium Earth AoE, 3 hits. Applies Powerful to self.

Monoco.name: Grosse Tête Whack
Monoco.description: High Physical single target, 5 hits. Applies Defenceless 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Hexga Crush
Monoco.description: Medium Earth single target, 2 hits. Applies Defenceless 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Jar Lampstorm
Monoco.description: Medium Physical AoE, 4 hits.

Monoco.name: Lampmaster Light
Monoco.description: High Light AoE, 1 hit. Increased damage at each cast.

Monoco.name: Lancelier Impale
Monoco.description: Low Ice single target, 1 hit. Slows target 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Luster Slices
Monoco.description: Low Physical single target, 3 hits. Applies Rush to self 3 turns.

Monoco.name: Moissonneuse Vendange
Monoco.description: High Physical single target, 3 hits. Can Break.

Monoco.name: Obscur Sword
Monoco.description: High Dark single target, 5 hits. More damage against Powerless targets.

Monoco.name: Orphelin Cheers
Monoco.description: Applies Powerful to 1–3 allies.

Monoco.name: Pèlerin Heal
Monoco.description: Applies Regen to all allies. On Caster Mask heals 40% HP.

Monoco.name: Portier Crash
Monoco.description: High Physical AoE, 1 hit. Can Break.

Monoco.name: Potier Energy
Monoco.description: Gives 1–3 AP to all allies.

Monoco.name: Ramasseur Bonk
Monoco.description: Low Dark single target, 1 hit. Can Break.

Monoco.name: Rocher Hammering
Monoco.description: Medium Physical single target, 4 hits. Can Break.

Monoco.name: Sakapatate Estoc
Monoco.description: Low Lightning single target, 1 hit. More damage if target is Stunned.

Monoco.name: Sakapatate Explosion
Monoco.description: Medium Lightning random targets, 3 hits. Crits trigger an additional hit.

Monoco.name: Sakapatate Fire
Monoco.description: Extreme Fire AoE, 3 hits. Applies 3 Burn per hit.
Monoco._note: AP cost unconfirmed — skill not yet learned

Monoco.name: Sakapatate Slam
Monoco.description: High Physical AoE, 1 hit. Increased damage against Marked targets.

Monoco.name: Sapling Absorption
Monoco.description: High Dark, 3 hits. Recovers 5% HP per hit.

Monoco.name: Stalact Punches
Monoco.description: Medium Ice single target, 4 hits. High Break damage.

Monoco.name: Troubadour Trumpet
Monoco.description: Applies a random buff to 1–3 allies.
